user.title: Sifely Smart Lock
user.description:
Enter your Sifely API credentials.

**Client ID** and **Client Secret** come from the [Sifely API Access portal](https://app-smart-manager.sifely.com/Login.html).

**Username** and **Password** are your personal Sifely *account* credentials — the same ones you use in the Sifely mobile app.

data_description.username: The email or phone number you use to log in to the Sifely app

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check that your Client ID matches exactly what the Sifely portal shows, and that your username and password are correct.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Sifely API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred — check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Sifely account is already configured.

add_passcode.name: Add passcode
add_passcode.description: Create a new guest passcode on a Sifely lock.

change_passcode.name: Change passcode
change_passcode.description: Update an existing passcode on a lock.

delete_passcode.name: Delete passcode
delete_passcode.description: Remove a passcode from a lock.

list_passcodes.name: List passcodes
list_passcodes.description: Retrieve all passcodes for a lock and log them.
